channel.title: Brazil Elections 2026
channel.description: Real-time monitoring of the 2026 Brazilian presidential elections.

item.title: Comissão de Segurança Pública pede que PGR avalie investigação de trend ‘caso ela diga não’
item.description: The Public Security Commission asked the PGR to investigate the 'if she says no' trend, which simulates violence against women in viral videos. Deputies consider the content encourages violence and should be removed from social media.

item.title: É #FAKE que Lula disse que Brasil 'está sob ameaça real de invasão' em discurso durante encontro com presidente da África do Sul
item.description: Social media posts falsely attribute to President Lula a statement claiming Brazil is 'under real threat of invasion'. The government denied these claims, explaining that the original speech about national defense and sovereignty was taken out of context during an event with the South African president.

item.title: Bolsonaro pede a Moraes aval para receber visita de assessor do governo Trump na prisão
item.description: Jair Bolsonaro requested permission from Minister Alexandre de Moraes to receive a visit from Darren Beattie, a Trump administration advisor, while in prison. Beattie, a critic of Lula's government and Moraes's actions, is scheduled to visit Brazil next week for an event on critical minerals.

item.title: Candidato de direita favorito na Colômbia escolhe ex-ministro para compor chapa
item.description: Candidato de direita favorito na Colômbia escolhe ex-ministro para compor chapa

item.title: Moraes autoriza visitas a Bolsonaro na Papudinha em abril
item.description: Moraes autoriza visitas a Bolsonaro na Papudinha em abril

item.title: Flávio Bolsonaro apoia que PCC e CV sejam considerados terroristas pelos EUA
item.description: Senator Flávio Bolsonaro supports US classification of PCC and Comando Vermelho as terrorist groups, a move that worries President Lula's government. The parliamentarian questions why the Brazilian government lobbies against this measure, while the Brazilian chancellor expressed concern to American authorities.

item.title: Argentina concede pela primeira vez refúgio político a foragido do 8/1
item.description: Argentina concede pela primeira vez refúgio político a foragido do 8/1

item.title: Crusoé: Lula contra os “Senhores das Armas”
item.description: Crusoé: Lula contra os “Senhores das Armas”

item.title: Concurso legitima entrada, mas não permanência, diz presidente do STJ
item.description: STJ president states that public exams only legitimize entry into the judiciary, not permanence. During a meeting with court presidents, he emphasized the need for stricter control mechanisms to preserve the judiciary's image, as all judges are affected when one member deviates from their role.

item.title: Guerra no Irã e preço do petróleo atropelam agenda eleitoral de Trump
item.description: The war in Iran is causing significant increases in gas prices in the US, undermining President Trump's economic message ahead of the midterm elections. While Trump downplays the effects, claiming prices are 'artificially elevated' and will fall after the conflict, Republican lawmakers express concern about the political repercussions of rising costs.

item.title: PGR pede que Supremo condene deputados do PL por desvios de emendas parlamentares
item.description: The PGR requested the STF to convict three PL deputies for passive corruption and criminal organization in the diversion of parliamentary amendments. The scheme, which operated between 2019 and 2021, involved extortion of municipalities for the return of part of the resources. The trial is considered a thermometer of the STF's position on the transparency of parliamentary funds.

item.title: Arqueologia na Amazônia ganha força com tecnologia e mais verbas
item.description: Lidar technology is revolutionizing archaeology in the Amazon, enabling the discovery of pre-Columbian sites previously hidden by dense vegetation. The Amazon Revealed project, launched in 2024, is scanning forest areas for ancient human structures. There is also increased interest from archaeologists and available funding for research in the region.

item.title: PGR pede que Supremo condene deputados do PL por desvios de emendas parlamentares
item.description: The PGR requested the STF to convict three PL deputies for passive corruption and criminal organization due to irregularities in parliamentary amendments. The case involves deputies Josimar Maranhãozinho and Pastor Gil from Maranhão, and substitute Bosco Costa from Sergipe. The request was made during a session of the STF's First Panel judging the defendants.

item.title: Carlos Viana lidera corrida ao Senado em MG; Aécio e Marília disputam 2º
item.description: Paraná Pesquisas poll shows Carlos Viana (Podemos) leading the Senate race in Minas Gerais, followed by Marília Campos (PT). Aécio Neves (PSDB) and Alexandre Kalil (PDT) compete for the second seat in different scenarios. 1,350 voters were interviewed across 52 municipalities with a 2.7 p.p. margin of error.

item.title: TSE retoma julgamento que pode determinar a cassação do governador do Rio, Cláudio Castro
item.description: The TSE will resume judging whether Rio Governor Cláudio Castro should be removed from office for alleged political and economic abuse during the 2022 elections. The accusations involve the use of state institutions for hiring electoral workers, with about 45,000 temporary hires and payments of approximately R$248 million.

item.title: Lula desiste de ir à posse de Kast no Chile; Flávio Bolsonaro vai
item.description: Lula cancels trip to Kast's inauguration in Chile, sending the Foreign Minister instead. Flávio Bolsonaro will represent Brazilian right-wing. The inauguration marks a political shift in Chile with presence of Latin American right-wing leaders.

item.title: “Em algum momento entregaram a chave do Congresso ao STF”, diz Viana
item.description: Senator Carlos Viana (Podemos-MG) criticized decisions by the Supreme Court (STF) that he claims interfere with legislative deliberations. His statements come amid clashes between the INSS CPI and the Court over investigative measures. Viana stated that 'at some point they handed the key to Congress to the STF'.

item.title: Delegado que indiciou Bolsonaro vira assessor de Moraes
item.description: Federal delegate Fábio Shor, who indicted Bolsonaro, was appointed as advisor to Justice Alexandre de Moraes at the STF. Shor led investigations on coup plot and Bolsonaro's former advisor's escape, facing attacks from the ex-president's supporters.

item.title: Argentina concede refúgio político pela primeira vez a envolvido nos atos golpistas de 8 de janeiro
item.description: The Argentine government granted political refugee status to Joel Borges Correa, convicted in Brazil for involvement in the January 8th coup acts. Correa was imprisoned in Argentina awaiting extradition to Brazil, but the request was analyzed in parallel by the National Commission for Refugees.

item.title: Para destravar sabatina de Messias, Planalto quer encontro de Lula com Alcolumbre até quinta
item.description: The Lula government is seeking a meeting with Senate President Davi Alcolumbre by Thursday to unblock Jorge Messias's confirmation hearing to the STF. Messias's nomination to the Supreme Federal Court is stalled, and the conversation between Lula and Alcolumbre is seen as crucial to advancing the process.

item.title: Deputado quer mobilizar estados e instituições contra o combate à pirataria; ouça a entrevista
item.description: Deputy Julio Lopes leads commission to combat piracy and illegal trade, highlighting annual losses of R$ 500 billion. Commission seeks partnerships with states and institutions to expand oversight. Deputy warns about organized crime's connection to illegal economy, advocating for international cooperation.

item.title: Julgamento no TSE coloca em risco candidatura de Castro ao Senado; governador de RR também tem plano ameaçado
item.description: The TSE is judging appeals that could annul the terms and declare ineligibility of governors Cláudio Castro (RJ) and Antonio Denarium (RR), both pre-candidates for the Senate in 2026. Castro is accused of political and economic abuse of power, while Denarium faces charges of irregular distribution of goods and resources during an election year.

item.title: Como aumentar sinal Wi-Fi no celular e melhorar a internet que parece sempre fraca
item.description: The text discusses how to improve Wi-Fi signal on cell phones when the connection is unstable, offering tips on adjustments that can be made on the device itself to enhance internet stability in daily life.

item.title: Projeto cria política nacional para ampliar acesso de pessoas com deficiência ao esporte
item.description: Bill creates national policy to expand access for people with disabilities to sports, aiming to reduce participation gap by 50% in six years. The proposal includes funding, monitoring, and creation of a national committee for implementation.

item.title: Vorcaro esteve em casamento da filha de Ciro Nogueira 10 dias antes de senador apresentar 'emenda Master'
item.description: Banco Master owner Daniel Vorcaro attended Senator Ciro Nogueira's daughter's wedding 10 days before Nogueira proposed increasing the Credit Guarantee Fund limit from R$ 250,000 to R$ 1 million. CPMI do INSS messages revealed Vorcaro called Nogueira one of his 'life-long friends' and celebrated the amendment benefiting mid-sized banks.

item.title: YouTube começa a liberar para políticos ferramenta que rastreia deepfakes em sua plataforma
item.description: YouTube is launching a pilot tool for Brazilian politicians to track deepfakes on its platform. The tool, still in testing phase, allows government officials, journalists and political candidates to identify content that uses their face artificially or altered.

item.title: YouTube começa a liberar para políticos ferramenta que rastreia deepfakes em sua plataforma
item.description: YouTube is releasing a deepfake tracking tool for Brazilian politicians and journalists, allowing them to identify content with potentially AI-altered faces on the platform.

item.title: Corrupção é o principal problema do Brasil para 9% dos brasileiros, diz pesquisa
item.description: Datafolha survey shows corruption is cited by 9% of Brazilians as the country's main problem, behind health (21%) and security (19%). Results come amid political scandals involving banker Daniel Vorcaro and allegations of irregularities in Social Security.

item.title: Corrupção é o principal problema do Brasil para 9% dos brasileiros, diz pesquisa
item.description: Datafolha poll shows corruption cited by 9% of Brazilians as main national problem, behind health (21%) and security (19%). Recent scandals involving politicians and businessmen are expected to be key topics in the 2026 elections.

item.title: Domicílio, local de votação e seção eleitoral: veja diferenças e como pedir transferências
item.description: Voters can request transfer of electoral domicile or polling place until May 6th through the Electoral Self-Service or electoral courts. Although similar, electoral domicile and polling place are different concepts in the voter registration.

item.title: Haddad confirma saída do governo, mas não crava candidatura contra Tarcísio
item.description: Finance Minister Fernando Haddad confirmed he will leave the Lula government next week but has not yet decided whether to run for governor of São Paulo against Tarcísio de Freitas. He is Lula's plan A for the state, where polls show Tarcísio leading with 44% to 31% in the first round and 52% to 37% in a potential runoff.

item.title: PL de Bolsonaro rompe com Ibaneis e propõe CPI do Master na Câmara do DF
item.description: PL broke with Governor Ibaneis Rocha and proposed a CPI in the Legislative Chamber of the Federal District to investigate the Master Bank fraud involving BRB. The crisis emerged after revelations of a contract between Ibaneis's law firm and a fund under investigation in the fraud case, making the governor the main target. The party now plans to support Vice Governor Celina Leão for DF Governor, with Bia Kicis and Michelle Bolsonaro running for Senate.

item.title: Lula cancela ida a posse de Kast no Chile após Flávio confirmar presença
item.description: President Lula canceled his trip to Chile for the inauguration of President-elect José Antonio Kast after Senator Flávio Bolsonaro confirmed his attendance. The decision came one day after Bolsonaro's confirmation, and Foreign Minister Mauro Vieira was designated to represent the Brazilian government at the event.

item.title: PL de Bolsonaro rompe com Ibaneis e propõe CPI do Master na Câmara do DF
item.description: The Liberal Party (PL) broke with Governor Ibaneis Rocha and proposed a CPI in the Legislative Chamber of the Federal District to investigate the Master Bank fraud involving BRB. This represents a significant political conflict in the federal capital.

item.title: Delegado da PF que indiciou Bolsonaro é nomeado como assessor no gabinete de Moraes no STF
item.description: PF delegate Fábio Alvarez Shor, who investigated coup attempts involving Bolsonaro, was appointed as an advisor to Supreme Court Minister Alexandre de Moraes. Shor, a counterintelligence specialist, led investigations into vaccine card fraud and Saudi jewels, becoming a target of attacks from the former president's supporters.

item.title: Novo lança candidatura de Adriana Ventura ao TCU
item.description: The Novo party officially launched the candidacy of federal deputy Adriana Ventura (SP) for the position of minister of the Federal Court of Accounts (TCU). The vacancy opened with the compulsory retirement of Aroldo Cedraz, and Ventura will face several other candidates in the race.

item.title: Justiça torna réu ex-marido de Maria da Penha por campanha de ódio
item.description: Ceará's Justice accepts charges and makes Maria da Penha's ex-husband and three other men defendants in hate campaign against activist. Group accused of spreading virtual attacks, fake news and forged report to discredit law named after her.

item.title: Delegado da PF que atuou em inquéritos sobre Bolsonaro e 8/1 é nomeado assessor de Moraes no STF
item.description: PF delegate Fábio Alvarez Shor, who worked on investigations against Bolsonaro, is appointed as advisor to Supreme Court minister Alexandre de Moraes. Shor has experience in investigations related to January 8th, coup plot, and Saudi jewels case.

item.title: Motta quer votar regulamentação do trabalho por aplicativos até o início de abril
item.description: Câmara president Hugo Motta announced plans to vote on app-based work regulation by April. The proposal aims to secure workers' rights including social security and insurance, but some points remain to be negotiated, particularly regarding minimum delivery rates.

item.title: Corrupção é o principal problema do Brasil para 9% dos brasileiros, diz pesquisa
item.description: Datafolha poll shows corruption is cited by 9% of Brazilians as the country's main problem, behind health (21%) and security (19%). Despite recent scandals involving political figures, concern about corruption is lower among Lula voters (4%) compared to Bolsonaro voters (14%).

item.title: A acirrada disputa pelo Senado em Minas Gerais, segundo nova pesquisa
item.description: Poll shows tight race for Senate in Minas Gerais, with Carlos Viana (Podemos) leading, followed by Aécio Neves (PSDB) and Marília Campos (PT) in statistical tie. In alternative scenario, Alexandre Kalil (PDT) also emerges as competitive. Margin of error is 2.7 percentage points.

item.title: STF AO VIVO – Julgamento de deputados acusados de desvio de emendas parlamentares – sessão de 10/3/2026
item.description: The STF's 1st Panel began judging PL federal deputies accused of embezzling parliamentary amendment funds. Deputies Josimar Maranhãozinho, Gildenemir de Lima Sousa and former deputy João Bosco da Costa are accused of passive corruption and criminal organization, allegedly requesting a 25% bribe on amendments allocated to São José de Ribamar (MA). The case involves eight defendants and was converted into Criminal Action 2670 after a PGR accusation.

item.title: Como consultar benefícios sociais pelo CPF no celular e evitar filas em 2026
item.description: In 2026, checking social benefits using CPF on a cellphone became a quick way to avoid queues and access information about social programs in Brazil. The digitalization of public services expanded access to important data, such as payment calendars and amounts, through official applications.

item.title: As intenções de voto para o governo de Minas Gerais, segundo nova pesquisa
item.description: Poll by Paraná Pesquisas shows Cleitinho (Republicans) with a large lead in the Minas Gerais gubernatorial race, leading with 45.6% or 45.8% against his main opponents Rodrigo Pacheco (18.4%) and Alexandre Kalil (22.6%). The survey interviewed 1,350 people between March 4-7, with a margin of error of 2.7 percentage points.

item.title: Deputados britânicos rejeitam proibir redes sociais a menores de 16 anos
item.description: British MPs rejected a proposal to ban social media use for under-16s, voting 307 to 173 against the measure. The Labour government preferred to await public consultation results, arguing that an outright ban could drive children to less regulated parts of the internet.

item.title: JOTA Principal: Pré-campanhas de Lula e Flávio retraçam rotas em meio a efeito de crises
item.description: Lula and Flávio Bolsonaro's pre-campaigns are adjusting strategies due to unexpected political shifts. Flávio's rapid rise in polls concerns the government, which plans to attack him more directly to deconstruct his 'light Bolsonaro' image, while Bolsonaro's team sees recent crises as opportunities to strengthen the senator's candidacy.

item.title: PGR pede ao STF a condenação de deputados do PL por propina em emendas
item.description: The PGR requested the STF to convict eight defendants, including PL deputies, for charging a 25% bribe on parliamentary amendments to municipalities in Maranhão. The scheme involved pressuring mayors and illegal financial operations. The trial is ongoing in the STF's First Panel, under the supervision of Minister Cristiano Zanin.

item.title: Governo Zema tem aprovação de 61% dos mineiros, diz pesquisa
item.description: Research shows 61% of Minas Gerais voters approve of Governor Romeu Zema's administration, while 34.7% disapprove. Zema, re-elected in 2022, cannot run for a third term. Cleitinho Azevedo leads in polls for the next gubernatorial race in Minas Gerais.

item.title: Lula desiste de ir à posse do novo presidente do Chile
item.description: President Lula canceled his attendance at the inauguration of Chile's new president, José Antonio Kast, after previously confirming his presence. The decision was made to avoid potential embarrassment, as Senator Flávio Bolsonaro confirmed his attendance, which could have led to an unwanted encounter between the two.

item.title: Lula desiste de viajar ao Chile para a posse de Kast
item.description: President Lula has canceled his planned attendance at Chilean President-elect José Antonio Kast's inauguration, changing the expected dynamic of the event. The decision comes after initial confirmation from the presidential office, which had also scheduled a bilateral meeting between the leaders. With Lula's absence, Senator Flávio Bolsonaro, a potential rival in the 2026 elections, is expected to attend as Kast's guest.
